requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Antigua and Barbuda BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为安提瓜和巴布达BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為安提瓜和巴布達BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Antigua and Barbuda does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation requiring pre-market type approval equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or Saudi SABER/IEC 62619 route as of the dataset date. The Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS) has authority to impose mandatory conformity requirements for product categories, but no confirmed dedicated BESS mandatory regulation has been identified from official ABBS sources. In project practice, IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for BESS cells and modules, and is expected to be referenced in project specifications for any APUA-connected or Caribbean Development Bank-financed BESS installation. Exporters must verify the current ABBS mandatory product scope directly before shipment.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，安提瓜和巴布达尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，要求与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特SABER/IEC 62619路径等效的预市场型式审批。安提瓜和巴布达标准局（ABBS）有权对产品类别施加强制合格要求，但尚未从ABBS官方来源确认专门的BESS强制法规。在项目实践中，IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，预计将在APUA并网或加勒比开发银行融资的BESS装置项目规格中被引用。出口商在出货前须直接向ABBS核实现行强制性产品范围。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，安提瓜和巴布達尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，要求與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特SABER/IEC 62619路徑等效的預市場型式審批。安提瓜和巴布達標準局（ABBS）有權對產品類別施加強制合格要求，但尚未從ABBS官方來源確認專門的BESS強制法規。在項目實踐中，IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，預計將在APUA併網或加勒比開發銀行融資的BESS裝置項目規格中被引用。出口商在出貨前須直接向ABBS核實現行強制性產品範圍。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Antigua and Barbuda project specifications)

IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems
ABBS (Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards) — national conformity authority; confirm current mandatory BESS product scope directly

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. These Chinese national standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 or IEC 63056, and are not accepted as equivalents in ABBS or project conformity review. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 and/or IEC 63056 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance documentation.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国国家标准未与IEC 62619或IEC 63056协调，不被ABBS或项目合格评定审查接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规文件外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619和/或IEC 63056测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國國家標準未與IEC 62619或IEC 63056協調，不被ABBS或項目合格評定審查接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規文件外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619和/或IEC 63056測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: IEC 62619 is the internationally expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules in Antigua and Barbuda project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes. Exporters should: (a) verify the current ABBS mandatory product scope for any pre-shipment conformity obligation; (b) obtain IEC 62619:2022 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules; (c) consider IEC 63056 additionally if required by project specification for system-level integration safety; (d) confirm whether Caribbean Development Bank or IDB financing requirements impose specific conformity evidence beyond ABBS mandatory scope.
gap.zh: 关键差距：IEC 62619是安提瓜和巴布达项目规格中BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实ABBS现行强制性产品范围，确认是否存在装运前合格义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得电芯和模组的IEC 62619:2022型式试验证书；（c）若项目规格要求，额外考虑IEC 63056的系统级集成安全要求；（d）确认加勒比开发银行或美洲开发银行融资要求是否超出ABBS强制性范围规定了特定合格评定证据。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：IEC 62619是安提瓜和巴布達項目規格中BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實ABBS現行強制性產品範圍，確認是否存在裝運前合格義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得電芯和模組的IEC 62619:2022型式試驗證書；（c）若項目規格要求，額外考慮IEC 63056的系統級集成安全要求；（d）確認加勒比開發銀行或美洲開發銀行融資要求是否超出ABBS強制性範圍規定了特定合格評定證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory BESS conformity scope under ABBS not confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with ABBS; IEC 62619 expected in project specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither accepted in Antigua and Barbuda

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Antigua and Barbuda as of the dataset date. IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in project specifications and APUA connection agreements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient. Verify ABBS current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, APUA, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，安提瓜和巴布达尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。IEC 62619是项目规格和APUA并网协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足要求。出货前请核实ABBS现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主、APUA及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，安提瓜和巴布達尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。IEC 62619是項目規格和APUA併網協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足要求。出貨前請核實ABBS現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主、APUA及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。

requirement_topic.en: Hurricane-Resilience and Environmental Derating — Wind Load, Salt-Mist, and Thermal Requirements for Antigua and Barbuda
requirement_topic.zh: 飓风韧性与环境降额——安提瓜和巴布达的风荷载、盐雾及热要求
requirement_topic.zht: 颶風韌性與環境降額——安提瓜和巴布達的風荷載、鹽霧及熱要求

summary.en: Antigua and Barbuda lies within the Atlantic hurricane belt and is exposed to Category 4–5 hurricane wind speeds (sustained winds exceeding 58 m/s / 209 km/h at the top end of the Saffir-Simpson scale). Post-Hurricane Irma (2017), which caused near-total destruction on Barbuda, resilience design is a mandatory project consideration for any fixed infrastructure including BESS. BESS enclosures, mounting structures, and cable management must be designed to applicable wind-load standards for the Caribbean (typically referencing ASCE 7 wind provisions or equivalent). Additionally, the marine tropical environment introduces sustained salt-mist corrosion, high humidity (averaging 75–85% RH year-round), and elevated ambient temperatures (26–32°C average, higher with direct sun on enclosures) — all of which must be accounted for in BESS cell, BMS, and PCS thermal management and enclosure IP/NEMA ratings. No publicly confirmed Antigua-specific BESS environmental design code was identified as of the dataset date; project developers should confirm requirements with the Antigua and Barbuda Physical Planning Unit and APUA.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达位于大西洋飓风带，暴露于四至五级飓风风速（Saffir-Simpson级别最高端持续风速超过58 m/s / 209 km/h）。2017年飓风伊尔玛（几乎摧毁巴布达全岛）过后，韧性设计已成为包括BESS在内的所有固定基础设施项目的强制性考量。BESS外壳、安装结构和电缆管理须依据适用于加勒比地区的风荷载标准进行设计（通常引用ASCE 7风荷载条款或等效标准）。此外，海洋热带环境带来持续盐雾腐蚀、高湿度（全年平均75-85% RH）和较高环境温度（平均26-32°C，外壳直接受日照时更高）——所有这些均须在BESS电芯、BMS和PCS热管理及外壳IP/NEMA防护等级设计中加以考虑。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认安提瓜专项BESS环境设计规范；项目开发商应向安提瓜和巴布达规划局及APUA确认相关要求。
summary.zht: 安提瓜和巴布達位於大西洋颶風帶，暴露於四至五級颶風風速（Saffir-Simpson級別最高端持續風速超過58 m/s / 209 km/h）。2017年颶風伊爾瑪（幾乎摧毀巴布達全島）過後，韌性設計已成為包括BESS在內的所有固定基礎設施項目的強制性考量。BESS外殼、安裝結構和電纜管理須依據適用於加勒比地區的風荷載標準進行設計（通常引用ASCE 7風荷載條款或等效標準）。此外，海洋熱帶環境帶來持續鹽霧腐蝕、高濕度（全年平均75-85% RH）和較高環境溫度（平均26-32°C，外殼直接受日照時更高）——所有這些均須在BESS電芯、BMS和PCS熱管理及外殼IP/NEMA防護等級設計中加以考慮。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認安提瓜專項BESS環境設計規範；項目開發商應向安提瓜和巴布達規劃局及APUA確認相關要求。

standards_or_laws: ASCE 7 — Minimum Design Loads and Associated Criteria for Buildings and Other Structures (wind load provisions referenced in Caribbean building design)
IEC 60068-2-52 — Environmental testing — Salt mist, cyclic (testing for corrosion resistance in marine tropical environments)
IEC 62619:2022 — includes operating temperature range and environmental stress requirements for industrial BESS cells
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level environmental requirements)
Antigua and Barbuda Physical Planning Act — land use and building permit authority relevant to fixed BESS enclosure structures

summary.en: Chinese BESS standards include environmental testing provisions, but these are designed for mainland China's climate zones — primarily continental temperate to subtropical, without hurricane-zone wind-load requirements. GB/T 36276-2023 specifies cell operating temperature ranges and basic environmental requirements. GB 44240-2024 includes thermal runaway and environmental stress provisions. Neither standard addresses Category 4–5 hurricane wind loads or sustained tropical marine salt-mist conditions consistent with Antigua and Barbuda's environment. BESS enclosures designed and tested to Chinese domestic standards must undergo supplementary assessment for Caribbean hurricane-zone wind resistance, salt-mist ingress protection, and tropical thermal management before deployment in Antigua.
summary.zh: 中国BESS标准包含环境测试规定，但这些规定针对中国大陆气候带设计——主要为大陆性温带至亚热带气候，不含飓风带风荷载要求。GB/T 36276-2023规定了电芯运行温度范围和基本环境要求。GB 44240-2024包含热失控和环境应力规定。上述标准均未涉及与安提瓜和巴布达环境相符的四至五级飓风风荷载或持续热带海洋盐雾条件。依据中国国内标准设计和测试的BESS外壳，在部署至安提瓜之前，须对加勒比飓风带风阻、盐雾防护和热带热管理进行补充评估。
summary.zht: 中國BESS標準包含環境測試規定，但這些規定針對中國大陸氣候帶設計——主要為大陸性溫帶至亞熱帶氣候，不含颶風帶風荷載要求。GB/T 36276-2023規定了電芯運行溫度範圍和基本環境要求。GB 44240-2024包含熱失控和環境應力規定。上述標準均未涉及與安提瓜和巴布達環境相符的四至五級颶風風荷載或持續熱帶海洋鹽霧條件。依據中國國內標準設計和測試的BESS外殼，在部署至安提瓜之前，須對加勒比颶風帶風阻、鹽霧防護和熱帶熱管理進行補充評估。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes thermal and environmental provisions; does not address hurricane wind loads or tropical marine salt-mist conditions)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (cell environmental and thermal requirements for China domestic climate zones)

gap.en: Significant gap: Chinese BESS environmental standards do not address Category 4–5 hurricane wind loads, sustained tropical marine salt-mist, or the specific thermal management demands of Antigua and Barbuda's climate. BESS equipment validated for China domestic climate must be supplementarily assessed and designed for: (a) hurricane-zone structural wind loads per ASCE 7 or equivalent — enclosures, mounting frames, cable tray systems; (b) salt-mist corrosion resistance per IEC 60068-2-52 or equivalent for coastal/marine tropical exposure; (c) ambient thermal derating — BESS capacity, BMS thermal parameters, and PCS derating curves must account for sustained 30–35°C ambient conditions rather than China's typical 25°C design point; (d) IP65 or higher enclosure rating for all outdoor components exposed to tropical rainfall and humidity.
gap.zh: 重大差距：中国BESS环境标准未涉及四至五级飓风风荷载、持续热带海洋盐雾，以及安提瓜和巴布达气候对热管理的特定要求。针对中国国内气候验证的BESS设备须额外评估并设计：（a）依据ASCE 7或等效标准的飓风带结构风荷载——外壳、安装框架、电缆桥架系统；（b）依据IEC 60068-2-52或等效标准的沿海/海洋热带暴露盐雾腐蚀防护；（c）环境热降额——BESS容量、BMS热参数和PCS降额曲线须考虑持续30-35°C环境条件，而非中国典型的25°C设计点；（d）所有暴露于热带降雨和高湿度的户外部件须达到IP65或更高防护等级。
gap.zht: 重大差距：中國BESS環境標準未涉及四至五級颶風風荷載、持續熱帶海洋鹽霧，以及安提瓜和巴布達氣候對熱管理的特定要求。針對中國國內氣候驗證的BESS設備須額外評估並設計：（a）依據ASCE 7或等效標準的颶風帶結構風荷載——外殼、安裝框架、電纜橋架系統；（b）依據IEC 60068-2-52或等效標準的沿海/海洋熱帶暴露鹽霧腐蝕防護；（c）環境熱降額——BESS容量、BMS熱參數和PCS降額曲線須考慮持續30-35°C環境條件，而非中國典型的25°C設計點；（d）所有暴露於熱帶降雨和高濕度的戶外部件須達到IP65或更高防護等級。

mandatory_status.target: Hurricane-resilience structural design is a mandatory project design requirement in Antigua and Barbuda; specific BESS environmental standard citations not confirmed from official sources — verify with Physical Planning Unit and APUA
mandatory_status.cn: Environmental testing per GB standards is mandatory for domestic deployment; Chinese standards do not address Caribbean hurricane-zone or tropical marine environmental conditions

source.publisher: American Society of Civil Engineers (ASCE) — post-Hurricane Irma Barbuda structural review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS environmental standards do not cover Category 4–5 hurricane wind loads, sustained salt-mist, or the elevated ambient temperatures characteristic of Antigua and Barbuda. BESS equipment validated solely for China domestic conditions must be supplementarily assessed for hurricane structural resistance, tropical salt-mist corrosion protection, and ambient thermal derating before deployment. Engage the Antigua and Barbuda Physical Planning Unit and APUA to confirm applicable wind-load and environmental design requirements for the project site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国BESS环境标准未涵盖四至五级飓风风荷载、持续盐雾，以及安提瓜和巴布达特有的高环境温度。仅针对中国国内条件验证的BESS设备，在部署前须对飓风结构抗力、热带盐雾腐蚀防护和环境热降额进行补充评估。请与安提瓜和巴布达规划局及APUA接触，确认项目现场适用的风荷载和环境设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國BESS環境標準未涵蓋四至五級颶風風荷載、持續鹽霧，以及安提瓜和巴布達特有的高環境溫度。僅針對中國國內條件驗證的BESS設備，在部署前須對颶風結構抗力、熱帶鹽霧腐蝕防護和環境熱降額進行補充評估。請與安提瓜和巴布達規劃局及APUA接觸，確認項目現場適用的風荷載和環境設計要求。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — IEC Wiring Standards and Antigua and Barbuda Electrical Inspectorate
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安装安全——IEC布线标准与安提瓜和巴布达电气检查局
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安裝安全——IEC布線標準與安提瓜和巴布達電氣檢查局

summary.en: Antigua and Barbuda follows IEC/British Standard (BS) electrical installation conventions, consistent with its UK colonial electrical legacy and APUA's IEC-aligned grid. BESS AC and DC electrical installation must comply with IEC 60364 (Low-Voltage Electrical Installations) series or equivalent BS 7671 (Requirements for Electrical Installations — IET Wiring Regulations) provisions, as applied by the Antigua and Barbuda Electrical Inspectorate. All electrical installations including BESS require inspection and approval by the Electrical Inspectorate before commissioning. BESS DC cabling, protection coordination, disconnection devices, and earthing arrangements must satisfy IEC 60364-7-712 (Solar PV) or applicable IEC 60364 sections for stationary battery installations. No publicly confirmed Antigua-specific BESS wiring regulation was identified as of the dataset date; installers should confirm applicable wiring code edition with the Electrical Inspectorate.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达遵循IEC/英国标准（BS）电气安装惯例，与其英国殖民电气传承及APUA的IEC对齐电网一致。BESS交流和直流电气安装须符合IEC 60364（低压电气装置）系列或等效BS 7671（电气装置要求——IET布线规程）规定，由安提瓜和巴布达电气检查局执行。包括BESS在内的所有电气安装均须在调试前获得电气检查局的检查和批准。BESS直流电缆、保护协调、断开装置和接地布置须满足固定电池安装适用的IEC 60364-7-712（太阳能光伏）或相关IEC 60364章节。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认安提瓜专项BESS布线法规；安装商应向电气检查局确认适用的布线规范版本。
summary.zht: 安提瓜和巴布達遵循IEC/英國標準（BS）電氣安裝慣例，與其英國殖民電氣傳承及APUA的IEC對齊電網一致。BESS交流和直流電氣安裝須符合IEC 60364（低壓電氣裝置）系列或等效BS 7671（電氣裝置要求——IET布線規程）規定，由安提瓜和巴布達電氣檢查局執行。包括BESS在內的所有電氣安裝均須在調試前獲得電氣檢查局的檢查和批准。BESS直流電纜、保護協調、斷開裝置和接地佈置須滿足固定電池安裝適用的IEC 60364-7-712（太陽能光伏）或相關IEC 60364章節。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認安提瓜專項BESS布線法規；安裝商應向電氣檢查局確認適用的布線規範版本。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364 — Low-Voltage Electrical Installations (applicable installation standard series in Antigua and Barbuda IEC/BS legacy jurisdiction)
BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 — Requirements for Electrical Installations (IET Wiring Regulations 18th Edition) — UK/Caribbean legacy jurisdiction reference
IEC 60364-7-712 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Requirements for special installations or locations — Solar photovoltaic (PV) power supply systems (applicable to BESS-integrated with solar)
Antigua and Barbuda Electrical Inspectorate — mandatory inspection and commissioning approval authority for all electrical installations

summary.en: China's electrical installation standards follow GB/T 16895 series (equivalent to IEC 60364 in structure but with China-specific derogations) and relevant NEA/NEC electrical construction codes. BESS installation in China follows GB/T 51048 (Code for Design of Electric Energy Storage Station) and GB 50054 (Code for Design of Low Voltage Power Distribution). These Chinese installation standards are not equivalent to IEC 60364 or BS 7671 as applied by Antigua and Barbuda's Electrical Inspectorate. Equipment supplied with Chinese-format wiring diagrams, terminal labelling in Chinese, or earthing arrangements designed for 220/380 V Chinese grid parameters must be adapted, re-documented, and re-inspected for Antigua and Barbuda's 230/400 V IEC wiring code.
summary.zh: 中国电气安装标准遵循GB/T 16895系列（结构上等效于IEC 60364，但含中国专项豁免）及相关NEA/NEC电气施工规范。中国BESS安装遵循GB/T 51048（电化学储能电站设计规范）和GB 50054（低压配电设计规范）。上述中国安装标准不等同于安提瓜和巴布达电气检查局执行的IEC 60364或BS 7671。提供中文接线图、中文端子标签或针对220/380 V中国电网参数设计的接地布置的设备，须在安提瓜和巴布达230/400 V IEC布线规范下进行适配、重新存档和重新检验。
summary.zht: 中國電氣安裝標準遵循GB/T 16895系列（結構上等效於IEC 60364，但含中國專項豁免）及相關NEA/NEC電氣施工規範。中國BESS安裝遵循GB/T 51048（電化學儲能電站設計規範）和GB 50054（低壓配電設計規範）。上述中國安裝標準不等同於安提瓜和巴布達電氣檢查局執行的IEC 60364或BS 7671。提供中文接線圖、中文端子標籤或針對220/380 V中國電網參數設計的接地佈置的設備，須在安提瓜和巴布達230/400 V IEC布線規範下進行適配、重新存檔和重新檢驗。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 51048-2014 — 电化学储能电站设计规范 (Code for Design of Electric Energy Storage Station)
GB 50054-2011 — 低压配电设计规范 (Code for Design of Low Voltage Power Distribution)
GB/T 16895 series — Low-voltage electrical installations (China equivalent of IEC 60364 with China-specific provisions; not equivalent to IEC 60364 as applied in Antigua)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese electrical installation standards and documentation formats are not accepted by Antigua and Barbuda's Electrical Inspectorate. Key differences: (a) China's 220/380 V system — protection relay settings, earthing impedance calculations, and cable sizing based on 220/380 V must be recalculated for 230/400 V; (b) documentation language — wiring diagrams, equipment labels, and installation manuals must be in English for Inspectorate review; (c) terminal markings and earthing conductor colour codes must conform to IEC 60446 (UK/IEC convention: brown/black/grey for phases, blue for neutral, green-yellow for earth) rather than Chinese convention; (d) confirm with the Inspectorate whether BS 7671 or IEC 60364 edition is the operative reference and whether any Antigua-specific derogations apply.
gap.zh: 差距：安提瓜和巴布达电气检查局不接受中国电气安装标准和文件格式。主要差异：（a）中国220/380 V系统——基于220/380 V的保护继电器整定值、接地阻抗计算和电缆截面选型须重新针对230/400 V进行计算；（b）文件语言——接线图、设备标签和安装手册须为英文以供检查局审查；（c）端子标识和接地导体颜色编码须符合IEC 60446（英国/IEC惯例：棕/黑/灰色为相线，蓝色为中性线，绿黄色为接地），而非中国惯例；（d）与检查局确认BS 7671还是IEC 60364版本为适用参考标准，以及是否存在任何安提瓜专项豁免。
gap.zht: 差距：安提瓜和巴布達電氣檢查局不接受中國電氣安裝標準和文件格式。主要差異：（a）中國220/380 V系統——基於220/380 V的保護繼電器整定值、接地阻抗計算和電纜截面選型須重新針對230/400 V進行計算；（b）文件語言——接線圖、設備標籤和安裝手冊須為英文以供檢查局審查；（c）端子標識和接地導體顏色編碼須符合IEC 60446（英國/IEC慣例：棕/黑/灰色為相線，藍色為中性線，綠黃色為接地），而非中國慣例；（d）與檢查局確認BS 7671還是IEC 60364版本為適用參考標準，以及是否存在任何安提瓜專項豁免。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — all electrical installations in Antigua and Barbuda require Electrical Inspectorate approval before commissioning; IEC 60364 / BS 7671 provisions apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 16895 and GB/T 51048 apply for BESS electrical design in China; not accepted in Antigua and Barbuda

source.publisher: Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS) / Antigua and Barbuda Electrical Inspectorate

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese electrical installation standards (GB/T 16895, GB/T 51048) are not accepted by Antigua and Barbuda's Electrical Inspectorate. BESS electrical design documentation must be prepared to IEC 60364 or BS 7671 standards in English, with voltage parameters, earthing calculations, and cable sizing recalculated for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Confirm the operative wiring code edition and any site-specific requirements with the Electrical Inspectorate before installation commences.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电气安装标准（GB/T 16895、GB/T 51048）不被安提瓜和巴布达电气检查局接受。BESS电气设计文件须按英文版IEC 60364或BS 7671标准编制，并针对230/400 V 50 Hz重新计算电压参数、接地计算和电缆截面选型。在安装开始前，请与电气检查局确认适用的布线规范版本及任何现场专属要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電氣安裝標準（GB/T 16895、GB/T 51048）不被安提瓜和巴布達電氣檢查局接受。BESS電氣設計文件須按英文版IEC 60364或BS 7671標準編制，並針對230/400 V 50 Hz重新計算電壓參數、接地計算和電纜截面選型。在安裝開始前，請與電氣檢查局確認適用的布線規範版本及任何現場專屬要求。
